reviews.author: Megan R.
reviews.text: Waited 50 minutes past the time they quoted and the brisket was dry when it finally came. Nobody apologized. Won't be back.

reviews.author: Carlos D.
reviews.text: Burnt ends are the best in Collin County, period. Pitmaster came out and talked smoke woods with us. Great portions for the price.

reviews.author: Ashley T.
reviews.text: Line moved so slow. Two registers, one person working. Food was fine but 40 min on a Tuesday lunch is crazy.

reviews.author: Bill W.
reviews.text: Ribs had great bark and pull. Sides are average. Would go back for the ribs alone.

reviews.author: Priya K.
reviews.text: Half pound of brisket, two sides, drink - under $20. Value is unbeatable and the staff remembered us from last time.

reviews.author: Jordan M.
reviews.text: Ordered ahead online, still waited 35 minutes at pickup. They lost the order twice. Chaos at the counter.

reviews.author: Tina H.
reviews.text: Brisket was amazing last month, this time it was dry and cold in the middle. Roll the dice I guess.

reviews.author: Derek P.
reviews.text: Best ribs I've had since Lockhart. The pitmaster clearly cares. Ask for the jalapeno sausage.
reviews.owner_response: Thanks Derek! Jalapeno sausage is back every Friday.

reviews.author: Sandra L.
reviews.text: Cashier was flat out rude when I asked about the wait. 45 minutes for two sandwiches.

reviews.author: Mike B.
reviews.text: Solid Texas BBQ. Brisket good not great, burnt ends excellent. Patio is nice.

reviews.author: Grace N.
reviews.text: Came for a birthday, they threw in free banana pudding and sang. Staff genuinely friendly.
reviews.owner_response: Happy birthday again Grace, see y'all next year!

reviews.author: Tom S.
reviews.text: Third visit, third long wait. 55 minutes this time and they ran out of brisket at 6pm on a Saturday.

reviews.author: Latasha J.
reviews.text: Portions are huge and prices fair. The two-meat plate fed me twice.

reviews.author: Kevin O.
reviews.text: Brisket tasted like it was reheated. Totally different from my first visit which was excellent. Consistency problem.

reviews.author: Dana F.
reviews.text: Really good burnt ends, generous sides. Parking is tight at lunch.

reviews.author: Raj P.
reviews.text: Great food great people!!

reviews.author: Raj Patel
reviews.text: Great food great people!!!

reviews.author: Emily V.
reviews.text: Table wasn't cleaned, floor sticky, and we waited 30 min for counter service. Food ok but the place needs attention.

reviews.author: Hank G.
reviews.text: This is real low-and-slow BBQ. Talked brisket with the owner for ten minutes, you can taste the care.
reviews.owner_response: Appreciate you Hank - come by for the whole-hog special next month.

reviews.author: Nicole C.
reviews.text: Good meat, slow line, average sides. If they fixed the wait this would be a 5.

reviews.author: Omar Z.
reviews.text: Waited an hour, then they got the order wrong. Manager never came out. Done with this place.

reviews.author: Beth A.
reviews.text: Ribs and pulled pork both excellent. Sweet tea is way too sweet even for Texas.

reviews.author: Sam K.
reviews.text: Best value BBQ plate in Plano. Big portions, fair price, friendly folks behind the counter.

reviews.author: Vic M.
reviews.text: Cold brisket, warm soda, 40 minute wait. How is this place still packed?
reviews.owner_response: Vic, that's not the experience we want - email us and we'll make it right.

reviews.author: Julia R.
reviews.text: The burnt ends melt. Staff treated my kids like family. We drive 30 minutes just for this.

reviews.author: Andre W.
reviews.text: Hit or miss. When it's on, it's top 3 in DFW. When it's off, it's gas station BBQ.

reviews.author: Cheryl B.
reviews.text: Great flavor, generous cuts. Lunch rush is brutal, go at 11 or after 1.

reviews.author: Frank D.
reviews.text: 45 minutes in line and they were out of ribs AND brisket. Post it on the door if you're out!

reviews.author: Lauren P.
reviews.text: Pitmaster's brisket rub is something special. Friendly crew, big portions.

reviews.author: Gus T.
reviews.text: Very good BBQ, slightly chaotic service. Worth it.

reviews.author: A
reviews.text: Texas twinkies are unreal.

reviews.author: B
reviews.text: Free banana pudding bar. Line moves fast.

reviews.author: C
reviews.text: Busy but efficient.

reviews.author: D
reviews.text: Brisket perfection.

reviews.author: E
reviews.text: Worth the drive from Dallas.

reviews.author: F
reviews.text: Best BBQ in DFW.

reviews.author: G
reviews.text: Great ribs, pricey.

reviews.author: H
reviews.text: Line out the door and still fast.

reviews.author: I
reviews.text: Staff is incredibly friendly.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text: Consistently excellent every visit.

reviews.author: K
reviews.text: Burnt ends and twinkies. Go.

reviews.author: L
reviews.text: Solid as always.

reviews.author: M
reviews.text: They handled a 20-person party without blinking.

reviews.author: N
reviews.text: Banana pudding alone is worth it.

reviews.author: O
reviews.text: Never had a bad cut here.

reviews.author: P
reviews.text: Fast line, hot food, kind staff.

reviews.author: Q
reviews.text: Legendary spot, great people.

reviews.author: R
reviews.text: Good ribs, friendly service.

reviews.author: S
reviews.text: The history and the flavor.

reviews.author: T
reviews.text: Solid lunch, quick line.

reviews.author: U
reviews.text: Catered our office event, flawless.

reviews.author: V
reviews.text: Brisket a bit dry today.
reviews.owner_response: Come back and we'll make it right.
